'''Delantine''' was a planet in the [[Delantine system/Legends|Delantine system]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] sent [[Granit]] to Delantine to bolster Rebel sympathy. [[Trux Zissu]] was chosen to be the [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of Delantine by the Alliance after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Trux and his son [[Stuart Zissu]] traveled to the Delantine system from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[4B-X]], and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in ''[[Timespan]]'', but the ship was disabled by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] warship when it reached the system. Trux gave himself up to the Imperials, buying Stuart time to escape to the surface of [[Da'nor]] in [[Escape pod 4|Escape Pod 4]] with the droids. The Galactic Empire conquered the planet although Granit was able to evacuate the Rebels.

On Delantine there are 16 languages spoken.
